kpis.name: New Leads Generated
kpis.definition: # of new leads added in period

kpis.name: Qualified Opportunities
kpis.definition: # of active opportunities with real commercial potential
kpis.notes: Use raw status and next action

kpis.name: Proposal Value (€)
kpis.definition: SUM of Deal Value (€) in Proposal

kpis.name: Deals in Legal
kpis.definition: # of deals currently in Legal

kpis.name: Avg Time in Legal
kpis.definition: Average days from first legal ticket to stage exit
kpis.notes: Requires start/end dates if later added

kpis.name: Deals in DD
kpis.definition: # of deals currently in DD

kpis.name: DD Completion Rate %
kpis.definition: Deals moved from DD to Integration / Deals in DD

kpis.name: DD Aging >30d
kpis.definition: # of DD deals with last follow-up older than 30 days

kpis.name: Clients in Integration
kpis.definition: # of deals currently in Integration

kpis.name: Integration Pipeline Value (€)
kpis.definition: SUM of Deal Value (€) in Integration

kpis.name: Integration to Go Live Conversion %
kpis.definition: Deals moved to Go Live / Deals in Integration

kpis.name: New Go Lives
kpis.definition: # of clients with technical + legal sign-off

kpis.name: Go Live Value (€)
kpis.definition: SUM of Deal Value (€) in Go Live

kpis.name: Legal to Go Live Conversion %
kpis.definition: Go Live deals / opportunities that entered Legal
kpis.notes: Measures execution quality after commercial agreement

kpis.name: Handover Completion Rate %
kpis.definition: Completed Handovers / Go Live Accounts

kpis.name: Stage Cadence KPI
kpis.definition: Average days between recorded funnel milestone dates
kpis.notes: Uses Prospect, Offer, Signed ETA, Integration, Live, and Handover dates; benchmark <= 30 days

kpis.name: Market Penetration %
kpis.definition: Live clients in market / total target operators

kpis.name: Existing Client Growth (€)
kpis.definition: Revenue uplift influenced in existing clients
kpis.notes: Manual input or linked rev data

kpis.name: Campaign Growth %
kpis.definition: Forecast Lift EUR / Budget EUR x 100
kpis.notes: Projected incremental lift relative to committed campaign investment

kpis.name: Active Lead Opportunities
kpis.definition: # de oportunidades activas con potencial comercial real

kpis.name: Avg Stage Duration
kpis.definition: Average number of days spent between recorded funnel stage transitions
kpis.notes: Use stage transition dates to identify the slowest handoffs in the funnel

kpis.name: Campaigns Executed
kpis.definition: Campaigns in Ready, Live, or Completed status
kpis.notes: Tracks how many campaigns have moved from planning into active execution

kpis.name: Pipeline Value (€)
kpis.definition: SUM of Deal Value (€) in New Business

kpis.name: Signed to Live Conversion %
kpis.definition: Go Live deals / Signed deals

kpis.name: Tasks Completed
kpis.definition: Completed tasks / total tasks in the selected review window
kpis.notes: Measures execution discipline and follow-up completion
